notebooks.title: Activity Coefficients
notebooks.description: Simulating how NRTL activity coefficients for the ethanol-water system evolve with temperature using PathSim blocks and connections.

notebooks.title: Continuous Stirred-Tank Reactor
notebooks.description: Simulating the startup transient of an exothermic first-order reaction in a cooled CSTR, showing the dynamic interaction between concentration decay and temperature rise.

notebooks.title: Counter-Current Heat Exchanger
notebooks.description: Simulating the startup transient of a counter-current shell-and-tube heat exchanger, showing how temperature profiles develop along the exchanger length.

notebooks.title: Cubic Equations of State
notebooks.description: Simulating the compressibility factor of methane across a pressure sweep using the Peng-Robinson and Soave-Redlich-Kwong equations of state wired into a PathSim simulation.

notebooks.title: Flash Drum and Distillation Column
notebooks.description: Simulating two fundamental separation processes: an isothermal binary flash drum and a multi-tray distillation column built from individual  blocks wired in series.

notebooks.title: Vapor Pressure Curves
notebooks.description: Comparing vapor pressure correlations for water by sweeping temperature through Antoine, Kirchhoff, and Wagner blocks wired into a PathSim simulation.

notebooks.title: Multi-Component Flash Separation (BTX)
notebooks.description: Simulating an isothermal flash drum for a ternary benzene–toluene–p-xylene (BTX) mixture.

notebooks.title: Process Flowsheet: Mixer → Heater → CSTR
notebooks.description: A simple process combining multiple unit operations into a flowsheet:

notebooks.title: Reactor Point Kinetics
notebooks.description: Simulating the transient neutron population in a nuclear reactor using the point kinetics equations (PKE) with six delayed neutron precursor groups.

notebooks.title: Valve Flow Characteristics
notebooks.description: Exploring the flow behaviour of the  block under varying pressure drop conditions.
